---
title: Post 1
author: Gen-Chang Hsu
date: '2026-07-06'
slug: []
categories: []
tags: []
image: img/default.jpg
weight: 100
---

This is the first test post.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

ggplot(data = iris) +
  geom_point(aes(x = Sepal.Length, y = Sepal.Width, color = Species)) +   theme_bw()
  
```
